stemHtml: In the context of callsigns, which of the following statements is correct regarding the use of “heavy” and “super”?

options.a: “Super” is used as a suffix in the callsign of an Airbus A340 or A380.
options.b: “Heavy” is used as a suffix to the callsign of aircraft belonging to the wake turbulence category “H”.
options.c: “Heavy” is used as a prefix to the callsign of aircraft belonging to the wake turbulence category “J”.
options.d: “Super” is used as a prefix in the callsign of an Airbus A380 only.
